Flow:   1. Trader calls deposit() when committing an order \u2014 funds are held here.   2. Hook calls executeSwap() on reveal \u2014 actual swap runs through PoolManager,      output tokens are credited to the trader's claimable balance.   3. Trader calls claim() to withdraw output tokens.   4. Trader calls refund() to recover funds if they cancel before params.amount: Amount to deposit (must match the committed amountIn).

params.data: The data that was passed to the call to unlock

returns._0: Any data that you want to be returned from the unlock call

claim(address).notice: Withdraw output tokens after a swap has been executed.

deposit(bytes32,address,uint128).notice: Deposit input tokens when committing an order.         Must be called in the same tx as TWAMMXHook.commitOrder().

executeSwap(bytes32,(address,address,uin.notice: Called by the hook after ZK proof verification to execute the actual swap.         Pulls deposited funds, swaps through PoolManager, credits output to owner.

refund(bytes32).notice: Recover deposited funds after cancelling a commitment.         Can only be called by the original depositor.

unlockCallback(bytes).notice: Called by the pool manager on `msg.sender` when the manager is unlocked
